mission: Verify the current public-alpha repository and website as a review-ready proof architecture surface.

gates.name: Mission Contract exists
gates.why: A bounded repository-readiness mission is generated by this action.

gates.name: Core public website surfaces present
gates.why: Users and reviewers need a coherent public path.

gates.name: Reference implementation modules present
gates.why: The repository should contain code artifacts behind the website story.

gates.name: Evidence artifacts present
gates.why: No Evidence Docket, no strong claim.

gates.name: Audit and QA reports present
gates.why: Generated reports make the public site inspectable.

gates.name: Reviewer documentation exists
gates.why: External reviewers need an accept / reject / revise / dissent route.

gates.name: Claim boundary is explicit and complete
gates.why: The page must not overclaim AGI, ASI, SOTA, production, legal, or investment status.

gates.name: Public demos avoid common network/storage/wallet APIs
gates.why: Public demos should not become data, wallet, or fund surfaces.

gates.name: Repository tests pass or are not applicable
gates.why: Failing tests should block review-ready status.

gates.name: Replay path and validator packet generated
gates.why: External reviewers need a replay route and review packet.

claims_matrix.claim: The repository has a coherent public-alpha website surface for review.
claims_matrix.boundary: Website completeness is not empirical AGI/ASI/SOTA evidence.

claims_matrix.claim: The repository contains reference implementation modules behind the public website story.
claims_matrix.boundary: Reference implementation is not production certification.

claims_matrix.claim: The repository publishes evidence/report artifacts and a reviewer path.
claims_matrix.boundary: Generated artifacts still require independent review.

claims_matrix.claim: The public site preserves no-data, no-funds, no-wallet, and human-review boundaries.
claims_matrix.evidence: boundary text scan and JavaScript safety scan
claims_matrix.boundary: This is a minimization posture, not legal advice or universal compliance certification.

remediation_queue: No mandatory remediation detected. Move to external review; do not treat as final empirical validation.
claim_boundary:
## GoalOS public-alpha boundary

GoalOS is a public-alpha proof architecture.

No user data. No user funds. GoalOS does not want user data. GoalOS does not want user funds. Do not submit personal, customer, confidential, regulated, credential, wallet, payment, private-key, seed-phrase, health, children’s, privileged, trade-secret, or proprietary data through public channels.

The public website and demos are browser-local public demonstrations: no wallet, no transaction, no network call, no production authority, and human review required.

GoalOS does not claim achieved AGI, not achieved ASI, empirical SOTA, production authorization, legal approval, user-fund authorization, mainnet activation, not investment advice, trading advice, tax advice, or guaranteed outcomes.
